titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/215

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=159 status=live modified=2017-01-31 03:48:01.070717+00 | translation moa=158 status=live modified=2017-01-31 03:48:05.056257+00

p.cl: Omnibus filiis sancte matris ecclesie . Rodbertus dei gratia minister humilis ęcclesie sancti ANDRee salutem .  episcopalem benedictionem .

Noscat uestra fraternitas
nos assensu tocius capituli nostri concessisse  carta nostra confirmasse ea omnia que rex dauid in elemosinam perpetuam dedit ęcclesię
sanctę crucis de edenesburc . Scilicet ecclesiam de castello cum saletunia .  omnibus alijs eius appenditiis . & ecclesiam sancti cutberti cum omnibus ad
eam pertinentibus . & ecclesiam de crostorfin . cum duabus bouatis  sex acris terre  ceteris rebus ad eam pertinentibus . & ecclesiam de ereth cum suis ap
pendiciis  in eadem uilla duas carrucatas terre . & unam salinam cum uiginti septem acris terre . & ecclesiam de uilla leuingi cum dimidia
carrucata terre  omni\bus/ alijs que ad eam pertinent . & ecclesiam de hamere cum omnibus appendicijs suis .  hameram  fordam cum rectis diuisis
earum . Broctunam cum rectis diuisis suis .  Inuerlet  pendendreiam cum rectis diuisis suis . & omnia quecumque carta regis testatur  sicut testatur .
hec ut predictum est concessimus  concedendo confirmauimus . & omnia alia que prefata ecclesia in futurum iuste adquirere poterit . salua dignitate &
auctoritate episcopali .

his testibus . Toraldo archidiacono . Aiulfo decano . Willelmo capellano episcopi . Gvalerenna capellano . Nicholao clerico .
Magistro hereberto scotto . Radulfo nepote episcopi . Rogero milite nepote . episcopi . Turstino filio leuingi .
To all sons of Holy Mother Church, Robert by the grace of God humble servant of the church of St Andrew, Greeting, and episcopal blessing:

Your brotherhood should know that we have by the assent of the whole of our chapter conceded and by our charter affirmed all the things that King David has given in perpetual alms to the church of Holyrood at Edinburgh. That is, the church at the castle with Saughton, and all its other dependencies; and the church of St Cuthbert with everything belonging to it; and the church of Corstorphine with two oxgangs and six acres of land and the rest of the things belonging to it; the church of Airth with its dependencies, and in the same toun two ploughgates of land, and one saltpan with twenty-seven acres of land; the church of Livingston with half a ploughgate of land and all other things which belong to it; and the church of Whitekirk with all its dependencies, and Whitekirk and Ford with their correct bounds; Broughton with its correct bounds; and Inverleith and Pittendriech with their correct bounds; and everything, whatsoever is attested by the king’s charter, and just as it is attested, these as it has been aforesaid we have conceded, and by conceding we have affirmed, and all other things which the aforementioned church in future might justly be able to acquire, reserving the episcopal dignity and authority.

With these witnesses, Thorald the archdeacon, Aiulf the dean, William the bishop’s chaplain, Waleran the chaplain, Nicholas the clerk, Master Herbert the Scot, Ralph the bishop’s nephew, Roger the knight and bishop’s nephew, Thurstin son of Living.
